name: w154_diff1_battery_anchor
guidance: Use the response options literally. Do not mechanically choose the more socially approved answer. For binary items, use each option only when the support type's dimensions make that answer plausible.

gender_difference_beliefs: believes men and women are mostly similar across domains
believes men and women differ in some domains but not others
believes men and women are basically different in many domains
biology_vs_socialization: sees both biology and socialization as relevant
domain_focus: expects differences mainly in physical domains
expects differences mainly in emotional-expression domains
expects differences mainly in workplace and interests domains
response_style: uses the similar option unless differences seem substantial
uses the different option when even moderate differences seem plausible
distinguishes sharply by domain rather than answering the same way throughout
